title: Polish Morning Glory Breakfast Noodles
description: A hearty breakfast recipe combining Polish sausage and Morning Glory flowers in a savory noodle dish.

ingredients.name: Morning Glory flowers
ingredients.notes: Use the young, tender flowers and leaves

ingredients.name: Noodles
ingredients.notes: Gluten-free noodles or traditional egg noodles

instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Morning Glory flowers and cook until wilted.
Stir in the cooked noodles, salt, and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Morning Glory flowers if desired.
Serve with remaining butter on the side.
